name: thinking-machine-smoke-evals
description: Lightweight qualitative eval prompts for checking whether a model uses the skill pack behaviorally, not just cosmetically.

cases.prompt: Design a live voice and screen-share AI assistant that can be interrupted mid-answer while a background agent searches docs.
failure_modes: treats real-time collaboration as ordinary chat
does not specify how background results merge back in

cases.prompt: Choose LoRA settings for domain SFT with 50k examples and a tight serving memory budget.
Audit why temperature-0 completions vary under production load.
Build an LLM workflow to forecast whether a specific bill will pass before a deadline.
failure_modes: outputs a probability without defining event resolution
uses rationale quality as the only evaluation
